name: @masarat/database
description: Masarat ERP — PostgreSQL/Neon database layer with Drizzle ORM

scripts.db:push: if [ "$ALLOW_DB_PUSH" != "1" ]; then echo 'REFUSED: the schema in this package (src/schema) does not match the tables used by apps/web -- pushing it would diff against the SAME DATABASE_URL the deployed app and .github/workflows/backup.yml use, and could rename/drop/recreate columns and tables, permanently deleting real agency data. This package is not used by the running app at runtime; never push its schema to the shared database. Only re-run with ALLOW_DB_PUSH=1 against a disposable local database.' >&2; exit 1; fi && drizzle-kit push
